data.name: Being built by a currently-running Sync job. Will replace the LIVE bucket on success.
data.value: Bygger af en kørende Sync-job. Vil erstatte LIVE-bucket ved succes.

data.name: Not referenced by any Mirror or Repository. Will be permanently deleted on the next Garbage Collection run.
data.value: Ikke refereret af nogen Mirror eller Repository. Vil blive permanent slettet ved næste Garbage Collection-kørsel.

data.name: Sum of all package file sizes listed in this bucket. Actual disk usage may be lower because CAS (content-addressable storage) deduplicates files shared between buckets.
data.value: Summen af alle pakkefilstørrelser angivet i denne bucket. Faktisk diskpladsforbrug kan være lavere, fordi CAS (content-addressable storage) deduplicerer filer, der deles mellem buckets.

data.name: This snapshot is actively served to apt clients as the current index.
data.value: Denne snapshot leveres aktivt til apt-klienter som det aktuelle indeks.
